title: What if Evas 3 and 4 lived
wikitext:
[]: What if Evas 3 and 4 lived...             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 09, 2008 2:20 pm Split from here : http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=4526 I shall have to dig out my notes of a "what if EVA-03 and EVA-04 worked OK?" scenario from ANF lo these many years ago... It ended up with pilot Horaki kicking ass and taking names when the harpies came to play.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 12, 2008 11:59 am Mr. Tines wrote: I shall have to dig out my notes of a "what if EVA-03 and EVA-04 worked OK?" scenario from ANF lo these many years ago... It ended up with pilot Horaki kicking ass and taking names when the harpies came to play.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 12, 2008 4:08 pm ep 21' wrote: FUYUTSUKI: Today is just like every other day. The disappearance of autumn from this country is truly sad. The Secret Dead Sea Scrolls that Seele possesses... If things happen as it is written in those scrolls, the Third Impact will happen in another decade or so without fail .

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 12, 2008 4:21 pm Only inevitable because SEELE wants it to happen and will kill anyone that suggests otherwise. Look, I've been through this with you already, EVA-04 can't stand in for Lilith, only EVA-01 can do to the direct link to her. Hikari has no way to get to the center of 3I. Like I said plot is plot and the plot was setup for Shinji to be there. Wishful thinking will never change that. In closing additional pilots wont change the ending at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 12, 2008 4:36 pm Mr. Tines(ANF) in thread 172730 wrote: So EVA-03 and EVA-04 make it safely to Tokyo-3; pilots Suzuhara and Horaki are inducted. Something in the initial tests makes Touji come over all protective in a "a guy's gotta do what a guy's gotta do" sort of way. Hikari thinks she's finally gotten through to him but he's still oblivious; and we have another disconnected couple. Meanwhile Bardiel manifests, and I'm afraid it's Asuka who looks most disposable at this point. EVA-02 goes amok. Hikari and Shinji won't fight; Rei is ineffective, Touji tries but hesitates at a critical moment, and then - well things get a bit like in NXE. Asuka spends the rest of the series in Room 303. Hikari tries to comfort Shinji, but he can't face human contact, and quits. Zeruel arrives and it's up to Touji and then Rei to try and hold it back. When EVA-03 falls, it's Hikari who then oversynchs in EVA-04 while Shinji is talking gardening and philosophy with Kaji. Rei takes the lead against Arael as planned; retreats promptly, and then employs the Lance Armisael vs Shinji, Rei and Touji (Hikari is held back for the same reason that canonically Shinji was) - this one could go in any of a number of different ways; but rather than saying that 3 Evas are enough to defeat it, say that Touji has to sacrifice himself. Ritsuko and Shinji still play out their parts for the rest of that episode. Cue Tabris, and a brief Hikari/Kaworu pairing (Has anyone ever done that pairing before???) End-game: Gendo's scenario is having to be revised on the fly as Yui-sama doesn't have an S2; SEELE are probably happy enough to employ EVA-04 as the medium for their plan. Shinji is probably useless, but would be stuffed into the entry-plug and EVA-01 dropped to the bottom of the lake while Hikari, operating without Asuka's limits, is able to eventually take down the harpies. Instrumentality proceeds as GNR erupts - but who guides the process? Ikari-kun who is calling from the bottom of the lake, or Hikari in the spiritually active EVA-04? Hikari's outcome would, I feel, be tidier than Shinji's.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Feb 13, 2008 12:56 am Hmm...how could Bardiel infect EVA-02...when it's a cloud...highly unlikely unless it's being transported by air...

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Feb 13, 2008 1:00 am I see a lot of things that make no sense to me. In the end it doesn't matter. More Evas wouldn't change anything important. It's Anno's story and he wanted to go a certain way and that's what was going to happen reguardless. Wishful thinking is wishful.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 13, 2008 1:12 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Hmm...how could Iruel infect EVA-02...when it's a cloud...highly unlikely unless it's being transported by air...

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Wed Feb 13, 2008 1:11 pm I reckon it would of only held off 3I and most probubly turned NGE into a longer series filled with many fillers. Anyone wanna predict when this will become a rebuild 2.0 theory thread.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Wed Feb 13, 2008 10:46 pm I think it would be cool if at least 03 survived, though 04 looks kinda lame [03 with a non-evil looking paint job, c'mon] anyone else think the fact they are both american made and [according to revoltech's figures] physically the same might be a dig at American creativity? Maybe I'm just paranoid...

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 13, 2008 10:50 pm Their destruction was appropriate and I could see it no other way.

[]:             Quote Post by wut_is_a_eva_lol » Thu Feb 14, 2008 12:24 am I don't understand how anyone could beat the harpies. They could have thrown 9 lances at Asuka from the start, ganged up on her, or waited until she started wrestling one them and then skewered her. They could have also waited another three minutes to land. Instead, they got killed one-by-one and only used a lance at the last second when it didn't matter anyway. I don't think an S-2 would keep any other pilot/EVA from getting hit in the eye or disemboweled. Don't get me wrong, I wouldn't change a single frame of that fight in EoE. It would have only come across as lame if Asuka had beaten them and lived.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Feb 14, 2008 12:28 am If they MPE's had done that, there would've been NO action at all in the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by wut_is_a_eva_lol » Thu Feb 14, 2008 12:56 am Sachiel_13 wrote: If they MPE's had done that, there would've been NO action at all in the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Tue Feb 19, 2008 3:23 am Flying MPE is watching you masturbate.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 12, 2008 5:52 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Hmm...how could Bardiel infect EVA-02...when it's a cloud...highly unlikely unless it's being transported by air...

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka's Plug Suit » Sat Apr 26, 2008 9:52 pm RandomStuff wrote: I think it would be cool if at least 03 survived, though 04 looks kinda lame [03 with a non-evil looking paint job, c'mon] anyone else think the fact they are both american made and [according to revoltech's figures] physically the same might be a dig at American creativity? Maybe I'm just paranoid...

[]:             Quote Post by cannonski » Sat Apr 26, 2008 10:07 pm I agree with the last comment, there was a reason I chose Unit-03's ugly mug as my profile avatar. Unit-03 would have looked kinda nifty if it had survived, but maybe the series required a certain threat with lower numbers of 'Units' available (ie after Armisael where Unit-00 self destructed, and Arael, where Asuka was fecked up, it would seem the only operational unit was Unit-01).

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sat Apr 26, 2008 10:18 pm Unit 03 arriving earlier and functional, with it's own pilot is a fanfic scenario I messed with. I've got this much worked out: Unit 04 arrives and is infected by the Thirteenth Angel. Hikari Horaki is the Fifth Child( Different EVA, different Child) Events play out much as they did, but Hikari is crushed to death by Unit 01... She'd crawled to the back of the plug to the escape hatch, rather than stayed in the chair (Something different to Touji..butterfly effect). Asuka goes through a bit of a loop, and the 4th Child is a bit bothered also..... Shinji still leaves. 14th Angel appears... Unit 03 is being repaired and checked, and so is launched first. 4th Child ordered to hold the Angel until Geofront defences are prepared. 4th Child defeated and wounded with Unit 03 critically damaged. Unit 03 damages Angel in return with positron rifle. An enraged and vengeance hungray Asuka is able to finish the wounded angel off with a blood-frenzy's prog-knife attack. Shinji does not return to NERV to Pilot Unit 01..which still rejects Rei. 4th child takes a month to recover, while Asuka grows ever more bitchy and self confident in her role as lead pilot. Hikari nags at her dreams... and that desire for violent revenge stews. Each single one is going to pay. Shinji stays with his uncle and is happy... he believes. 4th Child heals in time for 15th Angel. Unit 03 repaired. 4th Child a bit of a basket case. Asuka riding high. Angel decides the 4th Child would be a better target. Asuka charges in to save her, further reinforcing the German girls confidence and self belief to dangerous heights. Rei herself actually defeats the Angel. 4th child is removed from duty... Kawaoru comes in as Sixth to Pilot Unit 03. Rei is feeling somewhat lonely for Shinji's company, and decides to explore her thoughts, and ask a few questions of Commander Ikari. Possible character development here for Commander Ikari (Not just the Bastard King). Rei encourages Shinji to return for a visit...just in time for the 16th. Kaji dies...bridge gets dropped on the poor sod. Shinji ends up Piloting Unit 01 against the 16th. It attacks an overconfident Asuka, who screws up and gets in the way. Asuka gets mind raped and wounded. Kawaoru watches, pondering what Kawaoru ponders about killing his sister... Rei tries to take the Angel into herself...but fails because Asuka won't accept the help. Shinji finally snaps,, and drives Unit 01 berserk up to 400%. Unit 01 annihiliates the 16th, eating it whole...including S2 Asuka joins 4th child in Room 303...Shinji gooified inside Unit 01. Kawaoru and Rei2 form prime defence. Akagi remains loyal to Gendou. Misato worries to much about Shinji to spot the conspiracy. 4th Child recovers. Kawaoru takes Asuka's place. Rei prays in front of Unit 01. Shinji returns...takes an immediate disliking towards Kawaoru. Tabris Shrugs and decided he better do it. End result plays out the same as Ep 24... but Shinji is not as badly bothered about killing Kawaoru this time... he hasn't bonded with him. Net result is going into EoE A fourth child...who's still a bit unsettled in the mind.. and an extra EVA. Gets murdered by JSSDF Unit 00 intact...but not used in the end Rei still on her second clone only, remains under Gendous control. Asuka...she'll recover during the attack, only to get forked in the eye Misato knows nothing of the conspiracy. Dies defending Central Dogma. Shinji in a somewhat stronger place emotionally.....doesn't snap immediately...dies anyway like everyone else. Gendou initiates Third Impact with Rei, and she remains under his control. Cure episode 26 alternate reality.... without the realisation it is false. Only problem with that is... Unit 04 doesn't survive...and it's a bastardised version of an AU fic I messed with but couldn't make work.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sun Apr 27, 2008 10:22 pm I'm actually finishing up a FanFic centered around EVA-03 and 04. It's being Beta read now, and should be ready to post around May. It's set in the original series, not an AU. Anyway, I'll let all of you know when it's ready.
